provider: CUHK Department of Mechanical and Automation Engineering 2026-27 Major Programme Requirement
note: The official standard four-year Major Requirement is 75 units: 9 Faculty Package, 13 Foundation, 33 Required, 6 Research Component and 14 Major Elective units. Major Electives require at least 6 Breadth units, at least 6 Depth units, and at least 6 units in total from MAEG 4000-level-or-above, reciprocal ESTR, or ENGG 5000-level courses. Slash-separated standard/ESTR codes are retained as distinct official alternatives and must not be double-counted. Design and Manufacturing, Mechatronics, and Robotics and Automation are voluntary Streams; each requires at least 12 units from its prescribed list, and students may graduate without a Stream. The additional ELITE Faculty stream contains open ESTR/5000-level approval pools and is not expanded into a fabricated closed list; ESTR4998/4999 are retained only as the official ELITE replacement for MAEG4998/4999. ENGG1040 and PHYS1003 are excluded because they are conditional bridge/free-elective courses outside the 75-unit Major Requirement. University Core, College, physical education, free electives, double degree, minor and senior-year paths are excluded. Only courses explicitly placed in the official Recommended Course Pattern receive Year/Term; individual electives remain unassigned.
